name: Mimighoul Charm
desc: Once per Chain, during the Main Phase, if a "Mimighoul" monster your opponent controls is flipped face-up: You can randomly choose 1 face-down card in your opponent's Extra Deck, and if it is a monster that can be Special Summoned, Special Summon it to your field, but it cannot activate its effects this turn. If it wasn't, or couldn't be Special Summoned, banish that card. You can only use this effect of "Mimighoul Charm" twice per turn.
eff: Once per Chain, during the Main Phase, if a "Mimighoul" monster your opponent controls is flipped face-up: You can randomly choose 1 face-down card in your opponent's Extra Deck, and if it is a monster that can be Special Summoned, Special Summon it to your field, but it cannot activate its effects this turn. If it wasn't, or couldn't be Special Summoned, banish that card. You can only use this effect of "Mimighoul Charm" twice per turn.

sets.set: Rage of the Abyss Premiere! promotional card

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Extra Deck to your field
banished: Banishes from your opponent's Extra Deck
